Australian Machine Vision. # Australian Machine Vision

Australian Machine Vision is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Australian Machine Vision is an industry leader in vision system integration. They have deployed systems nationwide to Australia’s leading industrial and manufacturing corporations. They aim to apply the latest vision system technology, customise the system to suit the end user, provide the best price/performance solution, and provide vision system support. Australian Machine Vision employs 7 people (+100.0% YoY, +6 people), founded in 2005. Headquartered in Seaford, Victoria, Australia.

## About
Australian Machine Vision has partners, provided custom inspection, process control, and robot guidance solutions to Australian businesses for over 17 years.

We have successfully applied “area scan” “line scan” “laser triangulation” and “time-of-flight” technologies across a broad range of product types and environments, covering food & beverage, pharmaceutical, packaging, and industrial applications.

IUNA AI develops advanced deep learning-based camera systems and image processing software to take quality assurance in industrial manufacturing to the next level. Founded in 2020 and headquartered in Heilbronn, Germany, we specialize in automating the inspection of complex production processes. Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger. # Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger

Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger is a Software Development company. The company is an engineering office specializing in software development and automation. They offer a wide range of services including software development, automation systems, automation systems, visualization systems, application development, and laser adaptations. They have a global presence with production and production processes. They also provide customer and project-based training in German or English. Ingenieurbüro Guttenberger employs 3 people (+33.3% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2009. Headquartered in Germany.

## About
Als Ingenieurbüro für Automatisierungstechnik aus Schmidmühlen unterstützen wir seit 01/2009 unsere Kunden bei der Umsetzung anspruchsvoller Projekte – von der SPS-Programmierung bis zur weltweiten Inbetriebnahme.
Mit unserem Team aus acht erfahrenen Programmierern realisieren wir Lösungen effizient, praxisnah und zuverlässig. Jeder im Team bringt spezifisches Know-how und umfangreiche Projekterfahrung mit – eine Stärke, die wir gezielt für individuelle Kundenanforderungen einsetzen.
Wir arbeiten mit unterschiedlichsten Systemen und Technologien und passen unsere Leistungen flexibel an jedes Projekt an. Dabei stehen Qualität, Effizienz und eine enge Abstimmung mit unseren Kunden stets im Mittelpunkt.

These devices can collect varioius multimodal and multigrain bio-signals invasively or non-invasively. This large heterogeneous data from medical devices contains tremendous information that can be analyzed with artificial intelligence (AI). Many medical applications require edge-computing AI for real-time data processing, decision making, or feedback for unsupervised settings to seamlessly generate meaningful interpretations and actionable decisions with high degree of accuracy and reliability. Rapid progress in embedded technologies with high computing power and ubiquitous connectivity using Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and 5G along with miniature, low-cost, flexible, and reliable sensors have paved the hardware revolution for these technologies. Advancements in edge-computing AI algorithms with machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques with real-time interactive systems. Share your location in just 1 click! | WHERE AM I | WHERE AM I - See My Location Now on Google Maps | Wondering where am I right now ? Our Where am I app shows your current location on the map below or Google Maps and helps you find your coordinates and your location address. | Your location address will include: your country, your state when in the USA, city, zipcode, street name and street number. | This where am I map is static and is centered around your location at the time of the page load. You can also track your live location or find out your IP location . | Allow current location access to proceed | You can share your current location by sending the following "where am I" link. We've also added 2 quick buttons to send your current location now by text message or by email. The SMS button is compatible with any mobile device (iPhone, Android, etc.). | What is My Location on iPhone? | If you are visiting this page on an iPhone or on iPad, make sure your browser has been granted access to your location: Official Apple support . | If you are using an Android device, here is the link to make sure your browser has been granted access to your location: Official Google support .
about | About: where-am-i.co | About | About where-am-i.co, my journey to the best geolocation website on the internet. | About where-am-i.co | My name is Thomas Aunay, I have an engineering background and I started developing map-related websites in 2010. | Around 2015, I was working on a big project and created the current where am I tool as an add-on — something extra on a lower-level page. That page was still a work-in-progress when traffic started building up significantly, to my surprise. | Looking back, I believe it must've been due to its core practicality, usefullness and to the accuracy of the APIs which were used. In any case, its success led me to rebuild it as a standalone location website. | I have kept improving the site since then. It has been a challenging journey. With internet constantly evolving, I put a lot of time and efforts into finding the right instruments and securing sustainable relationships with new partners. I feel this is the best version of any where am I tool available out there and I hope you'll appreciate its speed and accuracy. | Don't hesitate to contact me about where-am-i.co or any other map-related subject as this is something I'm truly passionate about.

cn | Allied Vision - 工业相机，适用于机器视觉与嵌入式视觉系统 | Allied Vision为工业检测、医疗与科学成像等众多数字成像应用领域提供相机技术与图像采集解决方案。 | 精准，从此实现。 | Allied Vision - 工业相机，适用于机器视觉与嵌入式视觉系统 | Allied Vision将机器视觉专业技术凝聚于一个品牌之下。 | 当机器视觉项目不断扩大规模、承担更高责任时，管理多个供应商本身就会带来风险。接口越来越多，责任边界变得模糊，技术决策也随之更加困难。选择 Allied Vision，系统复杂性得以降低，责任更加清晰。作为值得信赖的技术伙伴，我们支持客户做出更有把握的决策，实现可扩展的系统设计，并确保稳定可靠的性能——在每一个对精准要求最严苛的应用场景中。因为精准，不是一句口号，而是您的系统在每一天、每一个应用中都必须真正实现的结果。 | 从相机、镜头、图像采集卡和IP核到软件、服务及统一SDK——所有组件均源自同一平台，并经过精心设计以实现系统级协同运作。 | 凭借业界领先的专业技术，Allied Vision解决方案团队与客户携手开发定制化、完整的视觉解决方案。通过让您专注于自身的核心能力，我们帮助您将更多精力和资源投入到业务中更具价值的环节。 | 依托三十余年的行业经验以及与多家行业领先企业建立的战略合作关系，Allied Vision解决方案团队可为不同规模的项目提供全面的视觉技术支持、稳健的长期发展保障，以及良好的系统可扩展性。 | 通过垂直整合的业务模式，以及与客户和内部研发团队之间的高效协作，我们确保所交付的解决方案不仅切实可行，而且持续创新。 | Allied Vision United Under One Brand At SPIE Photonics West 2026 Exhibition | At booth #6201 in Moscone Center, West, Level 1, the unified Allied Vision will present its versatile portfolio of components and integrated solutions, ranging from line and area scan cameras to smart cameras and image processing libraries. | 2026年1月，Allied Vision将旗下机器视觉品牌Allied Vision、Chromasens、Mikrotron、NET和SVS-Vistek整合为单一品牌。在一次访谈中，Allied Vision首席执行官Robert Franz阐述了以客户为中心的重要性，以及采取这一新举措的其他动因。 | Allied Vision将旗下2D机器视觉品牌整合为单一品牌
area scan cameras | 面阵相机 查看更多: 面阵相机 - Allied Vision | 面阵相机 | 探索面阵相机在工业应用中的优势。这些相机能够捕捉宽光谱图像，是检测、质量控制和过程监控的理想选择。凭借高分辨率和高速性能，它们完美适用于需要精细图像的应用场景。我们的面阵相机适用于汽车、食品和制药等多个行业领域。 | 通过将先进技术与便捷易用的操作相结合，我们为您的视觉检测应用提供稳定可靠的解决方案。依托我们的专业经验和完整的产品组合，我们能够根据您的具体需求，协助您选择最合适的面阵相机。 | 采用砷化镓铟（InGaAs）传感器的短波红外（SWIR）相机
line scan cameras | 线扫相机 查看更多: 线扫相机 - Allied Vision | 线扫相机 | 对于需要连续图像采集或高分辨率的应用场景，线扫相机提供了理想解决方案。这类相机专为捕捉传送带上移动物体或产品的图像而设计。凭借其高速与高分辨率特性，它们在印刷、包装、造纸、电子与半导体、纺织以及食品和回收领域的光学分拣等行业中，可完美满足实时产品检测、工艺监控、分拣和质量控制的需求。 | 我们的线扫相机专为在严苛环境下提供可靠且精准的成像而设计。通过将其集成到您的现有系统中，您可以借助我们的线扫相机优化生产流程，并提升产品质量。

Ceres Vision GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Ceres Vision GmbH is a company specializing in automation technology. They offer complete process modules and solutions in automation technology, including customizable automation solutions. They also provide 3D measurement, medical technology, and more. Ceres Vision GmbH employs 5 people (+20.0% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2002. Headquartered in bielefeld, nordrhein-westfalen, Germany.

## About
Industrielle Bildverarbeitung und intelligente Automatisierungtechnik in 2D und 3D
Wir bringen Computern das Sehen bei!

CMO-SYS GmbH. # CMO-SYS GmbH

CMO-SYS GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. CMO-SYS is a specialist in industrial image processing, measurement technology, and automation. They offer individual solutions for businesses and support them in planning and execution of complex projects. CMO-SYS GmbH employs 8 people (+60.0% YoY, +3 people), founded in 2011. Headquartered in Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

The Imago Group  is the largest channel for video communication in Europe, with a product offering that spans from video conferencing, cloud computing, digital signage, streaming, audio conferencing, IPTV, LCD displays, and interactive whiteboard technology. In addition to being the largest video-comunications equipment and infrastructure distributor in EMEA, the Imago Group Benelux works closely with several other notable vendors in order to provide our resellers with a complete solution that is tailored to their needs.
Our strategic vendor partnerships include; Avaya/Radvision, NEC, Samsung, Sony, eBeam, Revolabs, CBS, Unicol, Amino, Viewcast, Watchitoo and Chief. Imago also offer services from Deutsche Telekom and have strategic relationships with IBM and Microsoft.

Here are some reasons to partner with us:

• The Imago Group is represented in 8 countries around the globe. 

• Each country has access  to demo facilities, warehousing, sales and engineering services.

• Each account manager is a sales specialist, who has been highly trained enabling them to offer you the best advice.

It serves aerospace and defense, automotive transportation, consumer electronic, life science, and telecom infrastructure industries. In addition, the company serves clients in the telecommunications, automotive, aerospace and electronic industries. Averna has achieved ISO 9001:2000 certification. It involved in the implementation, and technical and commercial operation of toll collection systems comprising individual road sections and nation-wide road networks; provision of toll services for business and private customers; and implementation and operation of systems and solutions for traffic control and mobility behavior, as well as related components business. The company offers tolling products, such as on-board unit, roadside radio frequency system, roadside video, vehicle enforcement, smart toll, operational backoffice, image processing suite, enforcement and commercial backoffice, and geo location platform; and traffic management products, including traffic control device, roadside unit, connected vehicle platform, connected mobility control center, mobility data platform, deep learning versatile platform, mobility management platform, and advanced traffic management system. Zumbach Electronics is an e-commerce company that provides industrial gauging, process control, and data acquisition technology solutions. || Zumbach Electronics is an e-commerce company that provides industrial gauging, process control, and data acquisition technology solutions. | ZUMBACH Electronic AG is a manufacturer of on-line measuring, monitoring and control systems. We are spe­cial­ized in non-con­tact meas­ur­ing tech­no­logy. | ZUMBACH ELECTRONICS is a world-leading manufacturer of in-line measuring systems for industrial applications. We provide the most accurate, reliable, and comprehensive industrial gauging, process control, and quality/production data acquisition technology. With our extensive process and industry knowledge, we offer cost-effective solutions that help manufacturers achieve operational excellence.

ZUMBACH instruments precisely measure diameter, ovality, wall thickness, concentricity, cross section, shape, capacitance, and more. Zumbach also provides fault detection systems, inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection systems, in-line profile monitoring systems, data acquisition, and FFT analysis.

Leading manufacturers around the world have integrated Zumbach systems into their processes to increase output, reduce material costs and downtime, improve safety, and control quality. Zumbach systems provide quality improvements in manufacturing through tighter tolerances, better transmission capabilities, and improved workflow

Zumbach’s leadership is built on its expertise in various technologies including lasers/optics, ultrasonic, x-ray, high-voltage technology, computer hardware and software, and more. Numerous international patents and trademarks demonstrate Zumbach’s strength in innovation. | ZUMBACH ELECTRONIC ist einer der führenden Hersteller von Online-Messsystemen für den in-dustriellen Einsatz. Wir liefern präzise, zuverlässige, innovative und maßgeschneiderte Produktlö-sungen. Unseren Fokus legen wir auf die Kundenzufriedenheit und die Bedürfnisse der verschie-denen Branchen.

ZUMBACH ist ein Schweizer Familienunternehmen das 1957 von Bruno Zumbach gegründet wurde und heute von seinem Sohn Rainer Zumbach geführt wird. Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens be-findet sich in Orpund im Nordwesten der Schweiz. Weltweit gewährleisten kompetente Fachleute in 11 Tochtergesellschaften und mehr als 40 Vertretungen einen zuverlässigen Kundenservice.

Unsere Messlösungen garantieren unseren Kunden eine umfassende Qualitätssicherung, Pro-zessoptimierung und Protokollierung ihrer Produktion. Dank unserer langjährigeren Erfahrung und unserem Know-how können wir rentable und innovative Lösungen anbieten. Wir arbeiten nach hohen Qualitätsstandards und sind ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert.

Führende Hersteller weltweit haben Zumbach-Systeme in ihre Prozesse integriert, um die Produk-tion zu steigern, Materialkosten und Stillstandszeit zu reduzieren, die Qualität zu verbessern und zu dokumentieren.

Unsere Technologien
•	Laser/Optik

•	Erfahrener Partner | Zumbach Electronics Corp. was founded in 1976. The Company's line of business includes the manufacturing of instruments used to measure electricity and electrical signals. | Heating Contractors | Electronics servicers & distributors | Nature of business:
ZUMBACH Electronics is one of the leading manufacturer of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire and cable industry (from wire drawing to fiber optics, including extrusion of insulation and jackets), for the plastics and rubber induiustry (mono filaments, catheter, tubing, pipe or profiles) and for the steel and metal industry (hot and cold rolling, continuous casting, turning, grinding, polishing to QC inspection stations).
ZUMBACH instruments measure diameter (Laser Micrometers), wall thickness and concentricity (ultrasonic or eddy current principle), and detect lumps/neckdowns (optical flaw detectors). Specialized sensors monitor the capacitance of data wires and coaxial cables. - Controllers with application specific algorithms shorten start-up times, minimize scrap production and material usage. Data acquisition and FFT analysis are offered as well. A line of inductive preheaters for metal conductors, spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric, optical surface inspection system, and in-line profile monitoring systems complete the ZUMBACH line of industrial precision equipment.
• BDO AG, Biel/Bienne | Founded in 1957, Zumbach Electronics is one of the leading manufacturers of in-line measuring, monitoring and control systems for the wire, cable, plastics, rubber, steel and metals industries. The company has more than 50 employees and serves a wide range of industrial clients in the United States, Canada, Mexico and Central America. It is located in Mount Kisco, N.Y., and is a subsidiary of Zumbach Electronic AG, a privately owned company that provides in-line measurement systems based on various technologies, such as laser, ultrasonic and X-rays. The company s product line also includes preheaters for metal conductors and spark testers for in-line testing of the dielectric components. It provides products of various brand names, including ODAC, ODEX, Cellmaster, Profilemaster, Simac, Metrex and UMAC.

records.shortDescription:
Combining the French expertise and the German quality, FORT is a dynamic SME, subsidiary of the viZaar group. Created in 1972, FORT has become an expert in industrial endoscopy, reaching a wide variety of sectors such as nuclear, aeronautics, railway, military and automotive.
We offer a remote visual inspection system which is very well adapted to the non-destructive testing requirement of the industry, from simple products such as lighting cables or the high-end products  such as the long range videoscope VUMAN E3, including the portable and autonomous videoscope VUCAM. 
FORT delivers most of its products in Europe (France, Germany, United Kingdom etc.) but it also experienced a relative success reaching the global market of United States, Russia and India. 
Why choose us? As a SME, our responsiveness is no longer to be proved. We will meet all your inspection needs with our wide range and above all our products are customizable. Need to add a length or an optical adjustment in a short time and at a lower cost? We can respond favourably with our design offices. || Combining the French expertise and the German quality, FORT is a dynamic SME, subsidiary of the viZaar group. Erfahren Sie hier alles Wissenswerte zum Thema Automation & IT bei der AOT Solution. || AOT Solution GmbH
Sehr geehrte Geschäftspartnerinnen / Geschäftspartner,
als Experten im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung entwickeln und integrieren wir für Sie seit nunmehr 15 Jahren Bildverarbeitungslösungen in höchster Qualität. Ebenfalls haben wir mit unseren Partnerfirmen der AOT-Gruppe bereits verschiedene, fachübergreifende Projekte erfolgreich realisiert.
Wir möchten uns gemeinsam weiterentwickeln und die vorhandenen Synergien der AOT Gruppe bestmöglich nutzen. Daher haben wir uns dazu entschieden, die verschiedenen Geschäftsbereiche der AOT Gruppe in der AO Systems GmbH zusammenzufassen und zu bündeln.
Auf einem gemeinsamen Weg für eine erfolgreiche Zukunft
Wir freuen uns, Ihnen mitteilen zu können, dass die AOT Solution GmbH mit der AO Systems GmbH verschmolzen worden ist und wir Ihnen ab sofort unsere Leistungen im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung als AO Systems GmbH anbieten können. Unsere Mitarbeiter und Ansprechpartner stehen Ihnen unverändert und wie gewohnt zur Verfügung.
Alles aus einer Hand
Die Fusion hat uns die Möglichkeit gegeben, unser Leistungsportfolio zu erweitern. Die AO Systems GmbH steht nun als Komplettanbieter für Ihre Automatisierungsprojekte zur Verfügung. Neben unserer Expertise in industrieller Bildverarbeitung, Automatisierungstechnik und Robotik haben wir unsere Stärken in den Bereichen der mechanischen Konstruktion, Simulation sowie dem Bau vollständiger Roboterzellen und umfassender Automatisierungslösungen weiter ausgebaut.
Die Umsetzung Ihrer Automatisierungsprojekte – das ist AO Systems
Wir möchten uns für Ihr entgegengebrachtes Vertrauen bedanken und freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam mit Ihnen auf diesem Weg in eine erfolgreiche Zukunft zu gehen. Wenn Sie mehr über unsere Dienstleistungen erfahren möchten oder individuelle Anfragen haben, zögern Sie nicht, uns zu kontaktieren. Unser Team steht Ihnen zur Verfügung.

28755 Bremen

www.ao-systems.de

records.shortDescription: About Automatic Drive-thru tire check in seconds Impressum VENTECH Systems GmbH 46284 Dorsten Germany CEO: André Weisz Company Overview VENTECH Systems GmbH with its headquarters in Dorsten, Germany, is the world market leader in the field of stationary tire inspection system. Having been distin ... guished with various innovation and business awards, VENTECH Systems continues to develop and distribute diagnostic systems for the automated inspection of tires. Quality, sound experience and high innovation as well as technological potential have made VENTECH Systems a valuable partner in this field. For almost a decade now, PNEUSCAN has been the core of it all. Developed, produced and installed locally and internationally with premium quality components manufactured with German expertise. The unique system warns about incorrect tire pressure and insufficient tread depth. Furthermore, it detects irregular tire tread wear patterns and determines axle load and vehicle gross weight. There is no necessity for any adjustment neither on the vehicle nor the tires. It can be used indoors and outdoors. Many renowned companies in various industrial fields have been relying on PNEUSCAN’s stationary tire inspection system for years, to increase profitability and safety. The system has been in use as service and maintenance application for e. g. freight forwarders, car dealers, tire dealers, service centers, public and private bus companies as well as in fleet management - whilst also being able to be integrated to meet the clients unique process requirements, simply! See More PNEUSCAN systems work together to provide a total pressure and tread depth check system for buses, trucks, cars, heavy lift, and other specialty vehicles. PNEUS ... CAN also indicates axle load and total vehicle weight. With PNEUSCAN technology in place, annoying and time-consuming manual tire checking will become a thing of the past, as will tire related road-side breakdowns. On top, globalisation speeds up the course of action. At the same time, people and markets expect optimum quality and service - as fast as possible. To keep up, one needs perfect preconditions such as an automatic tire control system. See More General Information Regular tire checks serve as a basis for a significant reduction in costs and an increase of safety on the road. These particularly include the tire pressure an ... d tread depth check. The automatic tire control system PNEUSCAN helps our customers improve processes for better tire maintenance that promote greater road safety, lower fuel usage, longer tire wear and lower CO2 emissions. VENTECH Systems, ausgezeichnet mit verschiede ... nen Innovations- und Wirtschaftspreisen, entwickelt und vertreibt Diagnosesysteme für die automatisierte Reifeninspektion. Qualität, fundierte Erfahrung und hohe Innovationskraft sowie technologisches Potenzial haben VENTECH Systems zu einem wertvollen Partner auf diesem Gebiet gemacht. Seit fast einer Dekade wird PNEUSCAN bereits in Deutschland entwickelt, produziert und im In- und Ausland installiert. `Made in Germany` mit hochwertigsten Komponenten und innovativem Know-how - dazu gibt es weltweit nichts Vergleichbares. Das modular aufgebaute Reifenkontrollsystem PNEUSCAN ist in zahlreichen Märkten überaus erfolgreich eingeführt. Viele renommierte Unternehmen unterschiedlicher Branchen auf vier Kontinenten setzen mittlerweile zur Steigerung von Wirtschaftlichkeit und Sicherheit auf das stationäre Reifenkontrollsystem PNEUSCAN. Das einzigartige System warnt vor falschem Reifendruck und unzureichender Profiltiefe. Darüber hinaus erkennt es unregelmäßige Reifenprofilabnutzung und ermittelt Achslast und Gesamtgewicht des Fahrzeugs. Weder am Fahrzeug noch an den Reifen ist eine Justierung notwendig. Es kann sowohl im Innen- als auch im Außenbereich eingesetzt werden. Das System wird als Service- und IWartungstool für z. B. Spediteure, Autohäuser, Reifenhändler, Servicecenter, öffentliche und private Busunternehmen sowie im Flottenmanagement eingesetzt. See More Automatische Reifenkontrolle in Sekunden General Information Verkehrssicherheit ist keine Nische und kein Markt, sondern ein gesamtgesellschaftliches Anliegen mit politischem Willen und höchster Priorität. Die VENTECH Sys ... tems GmbH unterstützt diesen Willen durch wegweisende Entwicklungen mit der Möglichkeit einer automatisierten Reifenzustandsmessung. Regelmäßige Reifenkontrollen sind die Basis für eine erhebliche Kostenreduktion und Erhöhung der Sicherheit auf der Straße. Hierzu zählen insbesondere die Prüfung von Reifendruck und Profiltiefe. ABOUT US
Established in 2007 with the Aim to provide a second to none customer focused services within the ELV sector and serving the region for over a decade.
E-Net control systems have been evolving ever-since and our focus is at providing full integration of sophisticated systems and bringing them by simplistic means to clients for providing the best of technology which our industry has to offer.
We pride ourselves for our system solutions and technical expertise by providing turnkey ELV/ICT & Security systems all under the same roof, we have fully pledged highly skilled team covering all systems verticals. Our Engineers are trained and certified from the highest pedigree of globally renowned manufacturers. This enables E-Net to be the one stop solution provider for the entire ELV systems.
You are placed in the safest hands with E-Net, with a longstanding reputable clients, handling acute system integrations across the country, trusted and competitive in the market place. Its product and service portfolio includes ELV systems, ICT systems, SMART HOME solutions, electrical solutions, and consulting services. The company offers structured cabling, data networks, wireless data networks, IP telephony, IPTV, data centers, and more. records.shortDescription:
Henesis is a corporation that develops artificial perception and provides technologies for empowering people. || Henesis is a corporation that develops artificial perception and provides technologies for empowering people. | We combine our passion for cutting-edge technologies and science to solve global real-world challenges known to affect people quality of life. Today, we cooperate with relevant industrial partners, academic researchers, top experts and tomorrow, our prototypes will be tangible products entering your home, office, car, gym, medical center and hospital, to help people keeping or restoring autonomy and independence at physical, emotional and cognitive level. | Henesis srl is a young and dynamic start-up company, spin-off od Scuola Superiore Sant'Anna (Pisa, Italy). Henesis focuses on the conception, development and commercialization of advanced perception systems at multiple scales and for multiple markets. 
Besides a strong collaboration with TOYOTA in the field of soft computing for automotive and a running FP7 project in soft computing and machine vision in the medical domain, Henesis developed and is being selling a complete Wireless Sensor Network platform for distributed battery powered (yet long duration) remote data acquisition: from distributed collection of sensor data, through their wireless transfer in a potentially large network of nodes, to their storage on a remote Internet site and graphical representation on a secured web portal, where a complete and user settable alarm management and advanced data processing can be performed.
The company is also active in industrial quality inspection based on machine vision: a complete system for automatic inspection of train pantographs was developed and sold to the Italian National Railways was recently installed on the high speed railway system. Another  project was recently acquired, on automatic visual inspection of challenging items (metallic, reflective, multiply curved surfaces, high-speed moving).

records.shortDescription: VISIOSHAPE designs and integrates turnkey industrial robotic solutions that combine robots, vision systems and artificial intelligence. The company develops custom special-purpose machines that handle bin-picking, pick and place, quality control, machining, texturing and other tasks. Its offering includes mechanical design, electrical schematics, automation, installation, training and maintenance. VISIOSHAPE serves industries such as automotive, mechanical engineering, logistics, food processing and pharmaceuticals. It also provides Yoko, a configurable software platform that manages robots, cameras and automation equipment through standardized workspaces and remote connectivity. || VISIOSHAPE designs and integrates custom industrial robotic machines with vision and AI software for automation across multiple sectors. | VISIOSHAPE designs and integrates turnkey industrial robotic solutions that combine robots, vision systems and artificial intelligence. The company develops custom special-purpose machines that handle bin-picking, pick and place, quality control, machining, texturing and other tasks. Its offering includes mechanical design, electrical schematics, automation, installation, training and maintenance. VISIOSHAPE serves industries such as automotive, mechanical engineering, logistics, food processing and pharmaceuticals. It also provides Yoko, a configurable software platform that manages robots, cameras and automation equipment through standardized workspaces and remote connectivity. | VISIOSHAPE (anciennement sous le nom CTRL P) s’est historiquement développée à partir des activités de scan 3D de pièces et de retro-conception, notamment pour le patrimoine et les industries de la mécanique. Fort de ses partenariats avec des leaders industriels mondiaux, VISIOSHAPE devient un acteur innovant dans le développement de procédés industriels assistés par vision 3D. Nous innovons sur la robotisation des procédés industriels en intégrant sur les machines des cerveaux (intelligence) et des yeux (systèmes de vision) pour qu'elles puissent agir en environnement aléatoire et s'autoprogrammer en temps réel. Notre technologie VISIOSHAPE est concentrée dans un robot intelligent destiné à de multiples applications industrielles de traitement de surfaces mais aussi à la robotisation de procédés dans les industries de l’agro-alimentaire, de la logistique et du médical. L’atout de VISIOSHAPE est la reconnaissance de tous types de formes 3D et la génération de trajectoires précises et temps réel et sans se soucier des plans théoriques des pièces. Nous répondons ainsi à des verrous rencontrées dans des applications nécessitant une adaptation en temps réel aux formes des pièces. VISIOSHAPE est basé dans le quartier créatif manufacture à Saint-Étienne, au cœur de la cité du design. En lien avec un écosystème orienté vers l’industrie 4.0 et l’innovation. Au plaisir s'échanger avec vous ! www.visioshape.fr contact@visioshape.fr +336 71 15 56 53

E’ specializzata nello sviluppo di software personalizzati, di sistemi di supervisione e controllo e di Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES) per l’industria di processo, in particolare, nell’industria del Petrolchimico e della Microelettronica. Le esperienze accumulate in questi settori hanno permesso lo sviluppo di applicazioni software personalizzate anche in altri ambiti, quali ad esempio la Pubblica Amministrazione Locale, i Trasporti e le Telecomunicazioni. | Xenia offers software development, testing automation, cloud solution management, and IT security services. | The company is 30 years leader in ICT cutting-edge technology services customized to customer requirements. Its experience with the major Oil & Gas and Manufacturing Industries makes Xenia Progetti a preferred partner for innovative services and solutions in Italy and abroad, thanks to its strong technical skills and expertise in different operational areas and industrial processes. Xenia solutions for Industry maximize companies performance through better information and integrations, more efficient operations and personalized services. With fast time to market, Xenia provides the best-in-class solutions based on the most innovative software technologies to best satisfy its customer’s needs: Artificial Intelligence, Augmented Reality, Computer Vision, Virtual Reality. A innovative application is in the field of safety at work places: Xenia has developed interactive and non-interactive tools suitable for real-time monitoring and notification of events that can be considered a real risk or potential danger for workers. The same technologies are used in its applications for Museum and Cultural Heritage: enriching visitors’ experience through the use of wearable devices and integrated systems of Behavioral Analysis and Enhanced Vision for the improvement of services within museums and natural spaces. | PROGETTAZIONE E SVILUPPO DI SERVIZI INFORMATICI E TELEMATICI NEL CAMPO DELL AGROALIMENTARE, DELL ICT (MOBILE & RFID COMPUTING, SEMANTICAL WEB, CLOUD COMPUTING, ETC.), DELL AUTOMAZIONE INDUSTRIALE, DELLA SANITA , BIO-TECNOLOGIE, TELEASSISTENZA, AMBIENTE E SICUREZZA | Xenia Progetti si occupa di progettazione, consulenza e commercializzazione di beni e servizi nel settore dell’Information Technology.

E’ specializzata nello sviluppo di software personalizzati, di sistemi di supervisione e controllo e di Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES) per l’industria di processo, in particolare, nell’industria del Petrolchimico e della Microelettronica.

records.shortDescription:
Relimetrics is part of the Industry 4.0 movement that is helping to transform how companies design and build products. Relimetrics uses computer vision and machine learning and is a platform solution that is applicable to numerous industries, including automotive, manufacturing, plastics, insurance, and others. Its software helps customers to build better quality products and increase the productivity of their assembly or manufacturing processes. || Relimetrics is part of the Industry 4.0 movement that is helping to transform how companies design and build products. Relimetrics uses computer vision and machine learning and is a platform solution that is applicable to numerous industries, including automotive, manufacturing, plastics, insurance, and others. Its software helps customers to build better quality products and increase the productivity of their assembly or manufacturing processes. | Relimetrics is an industrial AI software company providing ReliVision, a GenAI-powered inspection and quality assurance platform. | Relimetrics is an industrial AI software company building programmable vision intelligence for autonomous and industrial systems. Its flagship platform, ReliVision, enables organizations to program perception itself—using GenAI to generate synthetic defects, adapt inspection logic and continuously evolve vision systems as products, environments and requirements change. Designed as inspection-native software, ReliVision transforms quality inspection into software-defined intelligence with built-in traceability, auditability, allowing vision systems to be deployed, reused and refined across products, lines, and sites. Relimetrics helps industrial teams move beyond static AI models toward vision systems that learn, adapt, and operate reliably in real-world conditions. Relimetrics operates in Sunnyvale, California, and Berlin, Germany. | Relimetrics, Inc. provides software solutions. The Company offers computer vision and machine learning software used for quality audit, process control and predictive maintenance. Relimetrics serves customers in the United States and Germany. | Relimetrics is hardware-agnostic platform software using computer vision and machine learning to track subtle changes between images (or video frames). It can monitor change in all kinds of materials with sub-pixel resolution, giving information on displacements, strains and potential material issues (e.g. defects) in near real-time and over time. As opposed to other computer vision systems used… · More to evaluate mechanical reliability, it is low-cost, easy to use, IoT-connected, mobile, cloud-based, provides automated assessment, and can detect the natural pattern of materials (as opposed to requiring application of a pattern which is needed for other image correlation technologies today). Case studies: Quality Assurance Case (performed with SAP and Arevo Labs): https://relimetrics.wistia.com/medias/8mvbsmvqrq and Infrastructure Monitoring: https://relimetrics.wistia.com/medias/tp8iyxtsoi | Relimetrics is part of the Industry 4.0 movement that is helping to transform how companies design and build products. Relimetrics uses computer vision and machine learning, and is a platform solution that is applicable to numerous industries, including automotive, manufacturing, plastics, insurance and others. Its software helps customers to build better quality products and increase productivity of their assembly or manufacturing processes.

The company was established in 2013, operates globally with hubs in Silicon Valley and Berlin, and has already delivered on a number of projects for top automotive companies, OEMs, plastics, and other manufacturers in Europe, Asia, and North America.

records.shortDescription: Greensoft is a software company that provides application development services for document imaging and barcode management sectors. || Greensoft is a software company that provides application development services for document imaging and barcode management sectors. | Greensoft nasce nel 1991 dall'esperienza maturata nel settore del Document Imaging e della gestione Barcode. Sin dagli esordi l'interesse è più per gli aspetti tecnologici base del document imaging che per le soluzioni applicative. Il modello aziendale è improntato alla partnership con software house e aziende di service e verte sulla fornitura di motori di base per compressione, visualizzazione e stampa a cui si sono aggiunti nel tempo funzionalità avanzate di riconoscimento supportate da una continua attività di ricerca di base su Image Processing e Pattern Recognition. Nel 1997 viene sviluppata una tecnica di compressione di Immagini di documenti capace di surclassare il rapporto di compressione dei formati standard di un fattore 10, da cui è poi derivata una efficente implementazione di supercompressione JBIG2 compatibile PDF. Oggi Greensoft dispone di una completa e originale collezione di componenti software per lo sviluppo di soluzioni di Data/Document Capture nonchè di applicazioni derivate su cui basano il loro business numerosi system integrator e centri servizi di primaria importanza. L'obbiettivo ora è far diventare Greensoft un player World Class nell'ambito delle tecnologie di base per il Document Imaging, con particolare riferimento al riconoscimento ed interpretazione automatica dei contenuti testuali e alla conservazione sostitutiva.

Unsere erfahrenen Experten unterstützen bei der Entwicklung des optimalen Bildverarbeitungssystems und der Auswahl der dafür perfekt geeigneten Komponenten. Dabei können wir auf starke Partner zurückgreifen: Mit international bekannten und erfolgreichen Herstellern decken wir von der Beleuchtung über Optiken, Kameras, Kabel, Bilderfassungskarten, Software bis hin zu Standard- und Embedded-Rechnersystemen alle Einzelkomponenten für die Erstellung leistungsfähiger Bildverarbeitungssysteme ab.
Über unser Integrator-Netzwerk empfehlen wir Ihnen zudem gerne zuverlässige Partner zur Realisierung schlüsselfertiger Bildverarbeitungslösungen.
 
Auf Basis unserer jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung beraten wir Sie gerne, um die für Ihre individuelle Anwendung optimale Lösung zusammenzustellen. Bildverarbeitung ist unsere absolute Kernkompetenz. InnoVision Industries is an industrial automation, software and hardware development company. || InnoVision Industries is an industrial automation, software and hardware development company. | InnoVision Systems, Established 2009. We started as an agency who provides innovative automation solutions for factories, labs and academic facilities.

Leveraging our knowledge with Sensors, Actuators, Mechanical Design and Control Software development, we started our Robotics Department (since 2015) and develop our first group of Robots which were carefully designed to tackle
some complex search and marking tasks for Explosive mines in the Egyptian Desert.
Next, we moved to building Service Robots and Industrial robots to cover various markets ranging from Industrial facilities, Industry4.0 , to Hospitality, hotels, resorts, and medical facilities | InnoVision Systems is an uprising and fast growing System integrator and solution provider in The Egyptian market. 
The company covers a wide spectrum of the economic sectors, such as Manufacturing, Telecom, Oil & Gas, Utilities, Biomedical Devices, Green Engineering and Research & Development, and also provides regional learning and education programs.

The company provides integrated end-to-end Industrial solutions and consultancy services that enable the customers to streamline their business operations, reduce their costs and time-to-market,  drive better performance, and build a competitive edge.

 InnoVision Systems is the Sole Alliance Partner for National Instruments in Egypt. 

 InnoVision Systems is a supporting organization for IEEE Robotics and Automation Society - Egypt Chapter’s activities.  InnoVision Systems supported Minesweepers: Towards a Landmine-free Egypt last year and supports Minesweepers: Towards a Landmine-free World, the first international outdoor robotic competition on humanitarian Demining that aims at raising the public awareness of the seriousness of the landmines and UXOs contamination and the role of science and technology in solving this problem and motivates professors, engineers and students working on innovative solutions for this serious problem. 

InnoVision Systems also organized two industrial sessions about advanced image processing techniques in industrial vision inspection and wireless sensor networks and real-time locating systems in the International Conference on Engineering and Technology (ICET 2012).

Our Vision
To be Recognized and Valued as one of the Premier Systems Integrators in the Region in our field of choice

The field of data science has been around for decades. Language models are great at summarizing and re-formatting data, but it does not have intelligence or actually generate anything. They are merely matching patterns in the training data. The reason large language model APIs do not work well is because they attempt to pattern match on vast amounts of irrelevant data. records.shortDescription:
OSSIS specialized in custom 3D print implants that are tailored to the specific needs of patients and doctors globally. OSSIS provides a remedy for significant bone loss and pelvic dissociations, where surgeons would otherwise have to devise a sophisticated solution during surgery. || About Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom implants. Precision Engineered Implant Solutions    Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of patient-specific implants.  Ossis' implants are used in orthopaedic,  ... spine and maxillo-facial surgeries.    Ossis' patient-specific implants are designed and manufactured to the highest standards - integrating advanced image processing, design software and manufacturing technologies to deliver innovative solutions to complex surgical procedures.     Ossis’ design and manufacturing experience allows us to create custom implant solutions in all areas of the anatomy, not only producing standalone solutions, but also custom solutions based on our unique manufactured structures incorporating ‘off the shelf’ implants (such as total knee and femoral components) manufactured by all major orthopaedic device companies. The flexibility of Ossis’ design and manufacturing processes maximises the range of treatment options available to surgeons.    Collectively the Ossis design team has over 40 years clinical and orthopaedic engineering experience. | About Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom implants. Additional Information Precision Engineered Implant Solutions Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of patient-specific implants. Ossis' implants are used in orthopaedic, ... spine and maxillo-facial surgeries. Ossis' patient-specific implants are designed and manufactured to the highest standards - integrating advanced image processing, design software and manufacturing technologies to deliver innovative solutions to complex surgical procedures. Ossis’ design and manufacturing experience allows us to create custom implant solutions in all areas of the anatomy, not only producing standalone solutions, but also custom solutions based on our unique manufactured structures incorporating ‘off the shelf’ implants (such as total knee and femoral components) manufactured by all major orthopaedic device companies. The flexibility of Ossis’ design and manufacturing processes maximises the range of treatment options available to surgeons. Collectively the Ossis design team has over 40 years clinical and orthopaedic engineering experience. See More | OSSIS is a orthopaedic implants care. | OSSIS specialized in custom 3D print implants that are tailored to the specific needs of patients and doctors globally. OSSIS provides a remedy for significant bone loss and pelvic dissociations, where surgeons would otherwise have to devise a sophisticated solution during surgery. | About Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom implants. Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom orthopedic implants and catering to the individual needs of Patients and Surgeons worldwide. | OSSIS specialises in custom 3D print implants catering to the individual needs of patients and surgeons worldwide.  We've been designing and manufacturing patient-specific orthopaedic implants for 12+ years.

OSSIS custom acetabulum augments are designed and manufactured to the highest standards - integrating advanced image processing, design software and manufacturing technologies to deliver innovative orthopedic implant solutions for complex surgical procedures.

OSSIS provides a solution for severe bone loss and pelvic dissociations where surgeons are otherwise faced with creating a complex solution during surgery. OSSIS creates a custom solution that is fit for only you and your patient. By performing much of the surgical planning before getting in to theatre, the unknowns are removed before surgery. An interactive and open communication approach is maintained with the surgeon during the design phase to ensure the final solution is customised to the surgeon’s needs.

OSSIS custom acetabulum augments are manufactured using advanced additive manufacturing techniques which create a solid one piece component with proven osseointegrative properties. Advanced design and manufacturing technologies contribute to a lead time of only three to four weeks after receiving the CT scan.

To ensure successful surgeries, OSSIS provides sterilisable plastic anatomical models and a sterilisable plastic trial of the implant. These models allow the surgeon to undertake preoperative surgical planning and being sterilisable they can be used for intraoperative reference. This leads to shorter successful surgeries and successful patient outcomes.

OSSIS has provided custom acetabulum solutions to scores of patients over New Zealand and Australia. These solutions have improved the surgeon and patient experience and led to the successful restoration of acetabular function which would otherwise be difficult to achieve with an off-the-shelf solution.

records.shortDescription:
Die WSK Elektronik GmbH bietet ihnen hochpräzise Prüfstände, ganz nach Ihren Anforderungen:

- Sparen sie Kosten, Zeit und manuellen Aufwand bei ihren Prüfaufgaben
- Optimieren sie ihre Prüfungen und machen Prüfergebnisse nachverfolgbar
- Reagieren sie auf Produktionsfehler schneller und senken somit die Ausschussrate
- Durch teil-automatisierte Prüfungen setzen sie ihr Fachpersonal effizienter ein
- Verkürzen sie die Entwicklungszeit neuer Produkte
- Steigern sie die allgemeine Effizienz ihrer Prüfprozesse

Alles aus einer Hand - Wir bauen komplette Prüfstände mit unseren eigenen, eingespielten Teams. Genießen sie besten Service und umfassende Leistungen:

- Beratung und Konzeption zur Umsetzung technischer Prüfaufgaben
- Entwicklung und Erarbeitung sinnvoller Lösungen
- Planung und Konstruktion (mechanisch und elektrisch)
- Projektierung
- Fertigung und Aufbau
- Softwareentwicklung – individuell zugeschnitten auf ihre Bedürfnisse
- Inbetriebnahmen und Abnahmen nach Kundenvorgaben
- Einweisungen und Service vor Ort

Für sie im Einsatz:
- Eingespieltes Team mit Erfahrung in zahlreichen Branchen
- Konstruktives Knowhow im Bereich Sondermaschinenbau
- Einsatz von Mess-, Steuer- und Regelungstechnik
- Fundierte Kenntnisse in Messdaten-Analysen und Auswertungen
- Softwareentwicklung auf Basis des WSK Frameworks
- Ausgiebige Erfahrung in der Entwicklung kundenspezifischer Prüftechnik || Die WSK Elektronik GmbH bietet ihnen hochpräzise Prüfstände, ganz nach Ihren Anforderungen:

records.shortDescription:
Consyd Software entwickelt anspruchsvolle Software für technische Systeme. Wir sind seit 1999 im Süden Deutschlands ansässig.

Automatisierungstechnik

Wir sind kompetenter Partner, wenn es darum geht, Ihre Systeme zu automatisieren. Unsere Dienstleistungen reichen dabei von der Steuerung und Regelung der Systeme bis hin zur Visualisierung der Anlage. Konsequent setzen wir Internettechnologien bei unseren Aufgaben ein.

Prozessvisualisierung

Wir können auf unsere entwickelten und erprobten Software-Komponenten zurückgreifen. Wir entwickeln und liefern Komponenten und Komplettsysteme.
Zum Beispiel im Bereich Durchsatz-Optimierung in der Halbleiter Industrie erzielen wir mit unseren Schedule-Modulen nachhaltige Erfolge. 

Bildverarbeitung

Wir bieten Ihnen für verschiedene Anwendungsfälle wie Fehlererkennung, Positionierung von mechanischen Teilen, Abnutzung, Lasertechnik oder weiteren Problemfeldern eine Lösung an.
Zum Beispiel Automatisieren eines Röntgen Messsystems mit Auswertung.

Realtime und embedded Systeme

Wir portieren diverse Betriebssysteme auf Ihr Zielsystem und entwickeln bei Bedarf entsprechende Treiber. Sowohl für Desktop- oder embedded-Betriebssystemen (z.B. VxWorks, INtime, Windows CE, Embedded Win) realisieren wir seit Jahren erfolgreich Projekte.

Webanwendungen

Konsequent nutzen wir Internettechniken für Kommunikation und Benutzerführung. Deshalb setzen wir neben ASP.NET  und node.js auch aktuelle Web-Sprachen (JS, HTML5) erfolgreich ein. 
Wir binden Ihr System an Standard Web Server an oder integrieren Web Server Dienste in Ihre Firmware und erweitern damit Ihre Anwendung um Server Client Funktionalität. Dazu schreiben wir die passenden Internet-Applikationen.

Bevorzugte Techniken

Sprachen:       C#, C++, Java
Web:               HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Angular, node.js)
Realtime:        VxWorks, Intime, QNX
Mobilgeräte:    Xamarin, native OS

Wir binden Ihr System an Standard Web Server an oder integrieren Web Server Dienste in Ihre Firmware und erweitern damit Ihre Anwendung um Server Client Funktionalität. Dazu schreiben wir die passenden Internet-Applikationen.

Bevorzugte Techniken

Sprachen:       C#, C++, Java
Web:               HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Angular, node.js)
Realtime:        VxWorks, Intime, QNX
Mobilgeräte:    Xamarin, native OS
Datenbanken: MsSQL, MySQL, MongoDB

INDUSTRIELLE AUTOMATION ist das B2B-Fachmagazin über Mess- und Automatisierungstechnik für Konstrukteure und Systemintegratoren.

INDUSTRIELLE AUTOMATION informiert unabhängig, kompetent und praxisorientiert über die neuesten Trends und ordnet aktuelle Entwicklungen aus Maschinenbau, Elektrotechnik und Prozessindustrie ein. Dabei stehen die Themen Sensorik und Messtechnik, Steuerungs- und Antriebstechnik, industrielle Kommunikation und Komponenten im Vordergrund. Eine Besonderheit bildet der Sonderteil IndustrialVISION - Bildverarbeitung, optische Messtechnik und Inspektion, welcher drei Mal im Jahr erscheint. Besondere Specials zu interessanten Themen runden das Spektrum ab.

INDUSTRIELLE AUTOMATION liefert mit ihren Analysen, Hintergrund- und Praxisberichten die Basis für Entscheidungen, gibt praktische Unterstützung im Tagesgeschäft und bietet durch Reportagen, Interviews, Kommentaren und eine Magazinoptik Lesevergnügen. Wer wissen will, was in der Automatisierung läuft, kommt an INDUSTRIELLE AUTOMATION nicht vorbei.

records.shortDescription: ENOIA is a Multi-Disciplinary Engineering & Project Management Consultant in the Energy, Water and Industrial sector. Its activities comprise a full spectrum of project management and engineering services ranging from professional advice on a particular problem to comprehensive planning and engineering design. We provide Consultancy Services, Project Management, Feasibility Studies, Basic Design, Front End Engineering Design (FEED), Full Detailed Engineering, Procurement Services, Construction Management, and Construction Supervision. ENOIA is specialized in design and engineering of piping systems with expertise in Fiberglass Reinforced Pipe Systems. ENOIA provides FRP Third Party Consultancy, Stress Analysis, Hydraulic, and Surge Analysis, Finite Elements Analysis (FEA), Studies of Static and Dynamic Behavior, Failure Analysis, Vibration Measurement, and Control, and Field Engineering and Audits. Since its formation in 1987, the group has expanded its global reach and can be found delivering excellence in Greece, UAE, India, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and Kuwait. The company is committed to achieving the highest standards of Health, Safety and Environmental (HSE) protection in all activities and services it undertakes, adhering to the most stringent national and international rules, codes and standards. It is also committed to providing services of the highest quality and to the full satisfaction of its clients. A Quality Management System (QMS) is implemented that is certified to ISO 9001:2015 requirements. Future Maintenance Technologies delivers AI-enabled robotics and digital systems that automate inspection and maintenance of rail and other critical assets. The company develops solutions such as the Automated Rail Infrastructure Inspection System (ARIIS), which captures and analyses infrastructure data to support condition monitoring and defect detection. Its platforms integrate sensors, machine vision and analytics to reduce manual track walks and improve maintenance planning. Service offerings include asset management consulting, implementation of digital maintenance systems, and support for global automated maintenance programs. Future Maintenance Technologies collaborates with rail operators and infrastructure owners to embed robotics into existing workflows, helping transition from reactive to predictive maintenance strategies. || Future Maintenance Technologies provides AI-driven robotics for automated rail and asset maintenance operations. | Future Maintenance Technologies delivers AI-enabled robotics and digital systems that automate inspection and maintenance of rail and other critical assets. Together, we aim to facilitate the global transition towards safer, more efficient, and sustainable critical infrastructure systems.

FSI is a regional leader that locally maintains inventory for your HVAC filtration products, supplies all Industrial Products, and provides the highest quality filter change-out service at an affordable cost. We not only stock and supply filtration related products from the world's leading filter manufacturers for virtually any application, we also offer scheduled filter change-out service and condenser coil cleaning. Based in Chicago and family owned, FSI is committed to quality products, expert technical support, timely delivery, and personal dedication to our customers. FSI provides highest quality, affordable, Commercial and Industrial Air Filter Change-Out Services, in addition to Coil Cleaning. Our service team offers a variety of maintenance schedules to meet your needs, providing services for over 5,000 accounts in the Greater Chicago area. Bausano extrusion lines are used for the production of granules, profiles, pipes, pockets and medical tubes, WPC profiles and granules. || Bausano extrusion lines are used for the production of granules, profiles, pipes, pockets and medical tubes, WPC profiles and granules. | Bausano is an international leader in the design and production of extrusion lines for plastic processing. With over 75 years of experience, the company supports manufacturers across the globe with innovative, tailor-made technologies that combine reliability, efficiency, and sustainability.

Headquartered in Italy and present in key markets through a network of subsidiaries and partners, Bausano operates with a clear industrial vision: to develop cutting-edge solutions that respond to evolving needs in sectors such as construction, medical, agriculture, and recycling.

Its strength lies in the continuous dialogue between engineering and customization. Every extrusion line - from twin-screw and single-screw systems to complete turnkey solutions - is developed in close collaboration with the customer, to ensure optimal performance and long-term value.

Bausano is committed to research and technological progress. Proprietary innovations such as the Smart Energy System or the advanced Digital Extruder Control platform are the result of constant investment in R&D, aimed at increasing productivity while reducing energy consumption and waste.

The company’s approach is grounded in professionalism and trust. Each project is supported by a dedicated team that follows the customer at every stage - from consultancy and design to installation and after-sales service.

Choosing Bausano means relying on a structured yet flexible partner, capable of turning complex technical requirements into efficient and sustainable industrial solutions. | Bausano & Figli SpA produces screw extruders and accessories for plastics. The Company produces a range of counter-rotating twin and single screw extruders. Bausano & Figli offers modular production system with lines, machines, and certified production. | Bausano & Figli spa is a mechanical or industrial engineering company based out of Italy. | High technology Extrusion Lines
Bausano extrusion lines stand out not only for their quality, great solidity and extreme reliability, but also for the possibility to customize every part.

Choosing Bausano means pick out a strategic partner that can help you to process plastics. We design and manufacture customised extrusion lines completely MADE IN ITALY for the production of pipes, granules, profiles, medical tubes, pockets and sheets in thermoplastic materials. | About Bausano doesn't only produce top-class plastic extrusion lines, but puts the clients'​ needs and wants at the center of everything it does. That's why we like to call ourselves 'Your Extrusion Allies'​. records.shortDescription:
Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. || Delft Robotics develops intelligent robotic systems to measure. | Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. | Delft Robotics started in 2014 as a spin-off of the European Union sponsored project 'Factory in a Day'. The project Factory-in-a-day aims to improve the competitiveness of European manufacturing SMEs by removing the primary obstacles for robot automation: installation time and installation cost. Due to the very positive feedback and large interest from the commercial sector, prof. dr. Martijn Wisse and Arie van den Ende kickstarted Delft Robotics. 
We aim to make more automation solutions accessible for small and medium sized production companies. With the use of industrial robotic arms and 3D vision solutions, highly flexible systems can be created with minimal development time. This allows for automation of repetitive and laborious production tasks which could previously only be performed by human employees.
Currently, Delft Robotics houses seven engineers - boasting expertise in robotic control, mechanical design, computer vision, artificial intelligence, system integration and human machine interaction. This team of engineers analyses new challenges, advises customers in next steps of automation, and develops and installs turnkey automation systems. Our close relation to the Delft University of Technology allows us to cooperate in the development of new technologies, and to use the new academic developments in the systems we deliver to our clients. Delft Robotics actively makes use of - and contributes to - the open source community for its products.

UTPVision is a manufacturing company that produces vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. || UTPVision is a manufacturing company that produces vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. | UTPVision is a leading provider of turnkey vision inspection systems for rubber and plastic parts. With a long experience in a variety of industries, UTPVision can develop solutions for virtually any application, precisely tailored to your needs.

Our cutting-edge inspection tools leverage machine vision algorithms, AI technology and patented multi-color illumination to quickly and reliably sort parts even at very high speed.

The modular design makes it easy to optimally configure each machine for the requested inspection tasks: UTPVision inspection stations integrate best-in-class optical, electronical and mechanical components for superior performance.

UTPVision was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Bergamo, Italy, with subsidiaries in the US and China. All systems are completely designed and manufactured at our R&D and production sites in Italy and distributed worldwide through a broad sales and service network.

Mabema provides, deploy and maintain radiation-resistant camera technology to the Scandinavian nuclear industry. || Mabema provides, deploy and maintain radiation-resistant camera technology to the Scandinavian nuclear industry. | Mabema is a company within vision systems, advanced imaging and image analysis. We provide our customers solutions for bin picking, robot guidance, measuring and quality inspection.

Our main focuses are on own developed products and systems in four specific business areas;

Industrial Vision - using platforms such as Cognex, Halcon and Matrox. Hardware depending on application but using only well proven international brands. Integrating systems for measuring, quality inspection and presence control mainly for recurrent customers. Customers mainly in Nordic countries.
Own developed machine for inspection of cartridges and ammunition.

Robot Vision - Own platforms such as Mabema Finder and Mabema BinPicker for robot guidance to identify and pick objects in 2D and 3D. Deliveries ranges from vision part as key solution part to complete robot cell solution. Customers mainly on the Swedish market.

Nuclear Fuel-Rod/Core inspection - Own developed products and systems for control and measuring nuclear fuel rods and cores in the reactor tank. Duty normal in heavy contaminated environment. Customer to be found in Sweden, Finland, Germany and USA.

Wood volume measuring - Own developed system for automatic measuring of log-piles on trucks using laser triangulation and 3D cameras and algorithms. Benefits are accuracy, speed and economy per measured pile.

☞ Innovative Products

At FPrimeC Solutions, we are committed to bringing leading technologies and creating exciting products that help our customers succeed in their business. Our product development starts with evaluating our customers needs, what are their ongoing challenges and problems. Our researchers and engineers then start studying potential solutions; we take these solutions, and turn them into exciting products that will shape the future of testing materials and structures. 

✹✹✹ i.Pile™ ✹✹✹
i.Pile™ provides an industry-standard quality built wireless device for low strain impact integrity testing of deep foundations and piles.  i.Pile™ can be used to expose potentially dangerous defects such as major cracks, necking, soil inclusions or voids in slender piles. Moreover, i.Pile™ can be used for determining unknown length of piles. i.Pile™ meets the minimum requirements of ASTM D5882.

☞ Innovative Engineering Services
FPrimeC offer innovative Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) services for rapid, accurate and cost-effective evaluation of structures. Our NDT solutions are a reliable, and affordable alternative to traditional inspection procedures, that will eliminate the need for excessive cutting and coring in structures, and improving worker safety. Our NDT solutions significantly reduce the inspection timelines, and can help scan wider areas.

Prüftechnik GmbH entwickelt und produziert seit über 37 Jahren kundenspezifische Systeme, Anlagen und Vorrichtungen für den Bereich der Dosier- und Prüftechnik, sowie Sondermaschinen für die Montage und Automatisierungstechnik. Diese werden vorwiegend zum Fördern, Dosieren und Auftragen von Flüssigkeiten, Fetten und Pasten sowie zum Montieren von Bauteilen und Prüfen von Funktionen angewendet. Unsere Produkte werden unter anderem in der Automobilindustrie, im Maschinenbau, der Montagetechnik, der Chemie-, Luftfahrt- und Elektroindustrie eingesetzt.

Im Ries verwurzelt, in der Welt zuhause….
Als national und international tätiges Unternehmen, stehen wir unseren Kunden im In- und Ausland mit einem umfassenden Service persönlich und vor Ort zur Verfügung.

Maßgeschneidert und pass genau…
Weil wir uns auf das konzentrieren was wir können, entwickeln und realisieren wir maßgeschneiderte und pass genaue Systeme, die konsequent an die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden gerichtet sind. | Dosier- u. Prüftechnik produces and supplies dosing and testing systems for greases, oils, and pastes in industrial automation. | Weil wir uns auf das konzentrieren was wir können, entwickeln und realisieren wir maßgeschneiderte und passgenaue Systeme, die konsequent an die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden gerichtet sind.
Alles aus einer Hand, wir begleiten Ihre Aufträge individuell und komplett von der Idee bis zur umfassenden Inbetriebnahme und ausführlicher Übergabe vor Ort. Unsere Fachabteilungen arbeiten bis zur Auslieferung eng zusammen und sichern so zu jeder Zeit eine kompetente Beratung und Betreuung. Jeder Auftrag hat seinen eigenen Projekteiter dieser überwacht alle relevanten Faktoren, wie z.B. die Qualität oder die Einhaltung des Budgets und die Zeitplanung.
Als Anbieter von Komplettlösungen entwickeln und erstellen unsere Konstrukteure eine detaillierte und maßgeschneiderte 3-D Modellierung, dazu nutzen sie die CAD-Software Creo Elements/Direct Modeling. Die dazugehörigen Pneumatik- und Schaltpläne werden in FluidDraw erstellt. Um höchste Qualitätsergebnisse zu erzielen, werden neben der Konstruktionsplanung systematische Gefährdungsanalysen und Risikobewertungen mit Safexpert durchgeführt. Durch die Verwendung von Prozess- Checklisten und Prozessorientierte QMS-nahe Vorgehensweisen überwachen wir jeden einzelnen Ablauf und haben so die Möglichkeit, die eigenen Prozesse ständig zu optimieren und zu verbessern.
Im Bereich der Hardware- und Softwareentwicklung, sowie im Schaltschrankbau verwenden wir die aktuellsten Tools und Techniken. Unsere Hardwarespezialisten verfügen über eine hohe Kompetenz im Bereich CE-Konformität und Maschinenrichtlinien, sie konstruieren normgerechte Schaltpläne mit System E-Plan und überwachen die Herstellung aller Komponenten bis zur elektrischen Abnahme mit hauseigenen Messmitteln. Wir nutzen standardisierte Software und Programmmodule.
Die D+P Standard Steuerungen werden mit einer Siemenssteuerung realisiert und mit TIA programmiert. Unsere Softwareentwickler begleiten auch den Inbetriebnahme Prozess vor Ort.
Die Fertigung erfolgt in enger Zusammenarbeit mit der mechanischen Konstruktion, sodass auch technische Probleme schnellstmöglich gelöst werden können. Ein modern und hochwertig ausgestatteter Maschinenpark durchdachte und effiziente Fertigungsstrategien und gut ausgebildetes Fachpersonal machen uns zu einem kompetenten Partner der Zerspanungstechnik. Durch unsere Unterschiedlichen Dreh-, Fräs-, und Schleifmaschinen sind wir in der Lage sämtliche einfache bis komplexe Bauteile selbst herzustellen.
Zusammen mit der Konstruktion und der Steuerungstechnik erarbeitet und erstellt unsere technische Redaktion CE-konforme Dokumentationen, Betriebsanleitungen und Einbauanleitungen für jede von uns hergestellte Maschine, Anlage und Komponente auf Wunsch in Papier- oder Digitaler Form. Schließlich steht bei uns nicht nur die rechtliche Absicherung im Vordergrund, sondern auch eine einfache und Verständliche Bedienerfreundlichkeit für unsere Kunden.

records.shortDescription:
SR Control provides quality assurance and inspection services for precision parts and assemblies. The company offers dimensional measurement using computed tomography and 3D coordinate measuring machines, as well as contour analyses with surface measuring equipment. Its services include initial sample inspection reports, laser engraving and marking, and visual surface inspection using magnifiers or microscopes. SR Control also performs deburring, rework, and cleaning of various components. In addition, the company handles assembly and final inspection of assemblies and individual parts, as well as sorting and packaging tasks. It conducts 100 percent manual inspection of precision parts based on defined defect criteria for industrial customers. || Unser Unternehmen steht seit 2005 für Qualitätskontrolle auf höchstem Niveau. Unsere Leistungen bedeuten für Sie Gewissheit in Qualität und Kostenersparnis - für Ihre Kunden Zufriedenheit mit Ihrem Produkt.
Wir bieten Vermessungen  mit verschiedenen Koordinatenmessgeräten, Vermessungen und Materialprüfungen mittels Computertomographie (CT) und Lasermarkierungen für Serienteile (QR Codes, DTMX Codes, Seriennummern, etc.) | SR Control provides quality assurance services including precision part inspection, measurement, rework, assembly, and packaging. | SR Control provides quality assurance and inspection services for precision parts and assemblies. Robotec Solutions designs and implements customized robot-based automation solutions for industrial customers. The company develops individual robot cells, testing stations, and fully integrated production lines that cover production and manufacturing, material flow and intralogistics, and quality assurance and testing. TKH Group N.V. operates as a technology company. The Company focuses on vision and security, communication, connectivity, and manufacturing technology. TKH Group offers integrated systems for telecommunication, building, and industrial solutions. TKH Group serves clients in Europe, North America, and Asia. || TKH Group NV is a technology company based in the Netherlands. It specializes in the development and delivery of systems and networks for the provision of information, telecommunication, electrotechnical engineering, and industrial production. | TKH is a leading innovative technology company. We create best-in-class technologies for Smart Vision systems, Smart Manufacturing systems, and Smart Connectivity systems. | TKH provides telecom, building, and industrial solutions. | TKH Group N.V. provides telecom, building, and industrial solutions based on system concepts, products, and related services in Europe, the United States, and Asia. Its Telecom Solutions segment develops, produces, and supplies outdoor infrastructure for telecom and CATV networks, and indoor home networking applications. This segment offers indoor telecom systems, such as home networking, broadband connectivity, power plug systems, and IPTV-solutions; fiber network systems; and copper network systems. The Telecom Solutions segment serves telecom and cable operators, service providers, telecom installers, telecom retailers, and housing association markets. The company's Building Solutions segment provides solutions in the field of electro-technology for the care and security sectors. This segment's product line includes building technologies comprising structured plug and play cable systems, light and light switch systems, video communication, and information systems; security systems, such as systems for CCTV, video/audio-analysis and detection, intercom, access control, central control rooms, and retail security; and connectivity systems, such as specialty cable systems for shipbuilding, railways, infrastructure, and energy markets. The Building Solutions segment serves utility, government, traffic infrastructure, care institutions, parking organization, marine and offshore, energy companies, and rail markets. | TKH Group N.V. engages un the automation and electrification business. in the Netherlands, rest of Europe, Asia, North America, and internationally. The Smart Vision Systems segment provides 2D and 3D machine vision technology systems used to enhance quality inspection, operation, and object monitoring; and security vision systems that enable customers to manage and control the urban environment, as well as enhances efficiency, safety, and security in various markets, such as infrastructure, parking, and building security. The Smart Manufacturing Systems segment offers systems engineering and assembly, control and analysis software, and connectivity and vision technologies to car and truck tire production, and factory automation industries; and care solutions, including medicine distribution machines. The Smart Connectivity Systems segment develops connectivity systems for on-shore and off-shore energy distribution; fiber optic connectivity systems for data and communication networks; and specialized cable systems for various industrial automation applications, such as the industrial, marine and offshore, and medical sectors, as well as provides contactless energy and data distribution comprising hardware components and intelligent software for airfield ground lighting systems. The company was formerly known as NV Twentsche Kabel Holding and changed its name to TKH Group N.V. in 2005. TKH Group N.V. was founded in 1930 and is based in Haaksbergen, the Netherlands. | TKH Group N.V. operates as a technology company. The Company focuses on vision and security, communication, connectivity, and manufacturing technology. TKH Group offers integrated systems for telecommunication, building, and industrial solutions. The technical services provider serves telecom companies, utilities, and manufacturers. TKH Group and its subsidiaries operate in two dozen countries around the world. Europe, of course, is its largest market. Twentsche Kabelfabriek (TKF), a leading Dutch cable production company was founded in 1930. After its expanded it became Twentsche Kabel Holding NV (TKH) in 1980. | TKH Group N.V. (TKH) is a leading technology company focused on advanced innovative technology systems in high-growth markets. 

Our mission is to create best-in-class technologies in the field of Smart Vision systems, Smart Manufacturing systems and Smart Connectivity systems. TKH aims to create sustainable value for all its stakeholders and provides disruptive technologies that improve efficiency, sustainability, safety, and security. 

The technologies are combined with internally developed software to create Smart Technologies and one-stop-shop solutions with plug-and-play integrated systems. TKH employs over 6,000 FTE employees and operates globally, with its growth concentrated in Europe, North America, and Asia.  

TKH is listed on Euronext Amsterdam with the ticker symbol TWEKA. TKH reports in three segments: Smart Vision systems, Smart Manufacturing systems, and Smart Connectivity systems.

One of its products, V.Q Assemble, is a camera and beamer supported inspection software for assembly processes. It is designed for both end users and system houses for industrial image processing who want to implement inspection solutions. Q.VITEC also has a subsidiary, Q.VITEC (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED, to integrate its software, Vision Q.400, into the Indian market. || In vieler Hinsicht besonders

Hervorgegangen aus einem der größten Elektronikkonzerne der Welt, versteht sich Q.VITEC als Lösungsanbieter in allen Fragen der industriellen Bildverarbeitung. Auf diesem Feld überzeugen wir mit intelligenter Software, verlässlicher Hardware und einer maßgeschneiderten Systemintegration.

Philosophie

Je komplexer die täglichen Herausforderungen, je höher die eigenen Erwartungen und größer die Ansprüche an die geleistete Arbeit sind, desto wichtiger werden Erfahrung und das richtige Know-how. records.shortDescription:
xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

xis.ai's platform is designed to be user-friendly, enabling non-technical industrial professionals to develop and implement AI-based visual inspection solutions quickly and efficiently. This approach aims to make advanced quality control technologies more accessible to various industries and applications. || xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

xis.ai's platform is designed to be user-friendly, enabling non-technical industrial professionals to develop and implement AI-based visual inspection solutions quickly and efficiently. This approach aims to make advanced quality control technologies more accessible to various industries and applications.
