records.shortDescription:
QualySense, an innovative Swiss company, is the inventor of the QSorter®, the most advanced and AI powered technology for automated quality inspection and fine sorting of grains, seeds and beans, from 30 to 3’000 per second. 

Get the most technically advanced robot in the world for quality control, breeding and fine sorting. The QSorter® is packed with features that deliver impressive accuracy and consistency in the measurement of quality parameters of seeds, grains and beans. Our 3D Vision camera and the high resolution spectroscopy sensor can detect the most challenging physical details and several biochemical properties. The quality parameters predictions are based AI algorithms, whose accuracy over time.

Simply log in the SQI2 Cloud platform to access all the data and share them with collaborators, partners and customers in no time. 

Say goodbye to subjectivity and sampling errors, to lengthy and expensive quality inspection protocols, to disagreements between stakeholders and start using QSorter®. Enable the selection of crops with respect to biochemical properties or upgrade lots by removing defected or unwanted beans. 

Start using the QSorter® today 

Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OF8exqmmsl8 || QualySense, an innovative Swiss company, is the inventor of the QSorter®, the most advanced and AI powered technology for automated quality inspection and fine sorting of grains, seeds and beans, from 30 to 3’000 per second.

Fizyr enables the automating of human tasks in logistics using AI. Their deep learning algorithm adds a layer of understanding, bringing autonomous decision making to processes that involve classifying, quality control*, counting, picking and manipulating. || Fizyr enables the automating of human tasks in logistics using AI. Their deep learning algorithm adds a layer of understanding, bringing autonomous decision making to processes that involve classifying, quality control*, counting, picking and manipulating. | Vision software-with native AI and machine learning capabilities, solving the most difficult automation problems | Fizyr enables the automating of human tasks in logistics using AI.  Their deep learning algorithm adds a layer of understanding, bringing autonomous decision making to processes that involve classifying, quality control*, counting, picking and manipulating. | Forks by Fizyr. Artificial intelligence for vision guided robotics. We're hiring! https://fizyr.com/careers/ | Artificial intelligence for vision guided robotics. We're hiring! https://fizyr.com/careers/ | Computer vision software- with native artificial intelligence and machine learning - built for picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing and trailer unloading. Fizyr designs, builds, installs, and maintains an unmatched vision software product for automated picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing, and trailer unloading. Our deep learning algorithms are used to enable automated handling of unknown objects varying in shape, size, color, material, and stacking, being picked from (conveyed) bulk. Fizyr’s product is applied in production all over the world by leading system integrators and end-users, in online retail, warehousing and parcel services.  

We started in 2014 as ‘Delft Robotics’, a TU Delft spin-off founded by Professor Martijn Wisse, as a system integrator building robotic picking cells. In 2016, we participated in and won both competitions of the Amazon Picking challenge, mainly due to our track record in applying deep learning. This led to the company pivoting towards a deep learning computer vision software-only product and re-branding to Fizyr in 2017.  

Our Plug-and-Play modular product allows for a smooth integration with any system. We give integrators the freedom to choose the best hardware for their picking cell and we help them configure it, while facilitating cost, robustness, and speed optimization. Our algorithms provide over 100 grasp poses each second, including classification to handle objects differently, but also perform quality controls and detect defects to prevent damaged items from being placed on a sorter.  

Leading integrators across the globe acknowledged our product’s high quality and used it in production. This is what makes us truly unique; we were trusted as a strategic partner and grew successfully bootstrapped since the beginning. Up to this day, we remain dedicated to creating true value for our partners, so that they can create cutting-edge logistics solutions for their clients.

MODI Modular Digits GmbH develops revolutionary camera technology. The Company offers entrance control, detailed viewing, goods entry scanner, industrial vision, and code reading systems. || MODI Modular Digits GmbH develops revolutionary camera technology. The Company offers entrance control, detailed viewing, goods entry scanner, industrial vision, and code reading systems. | MODI GmbH is a German company specializing in identification solutions for non-contact biometrics and the traceability of industrial products through innovative, patented vision solutions such as ADOMO®.

MODI GmbH divides the two business areas:

MODI Vision | Biometric Face Recognition:
Software and hardware for automatic and secure personal identification! "Anti-spoofing"​ or "anti-tail gating"​ solutions make the biometric access control solution secure, user-friendly and efficient with maximum throughput. The product range extends from biometric registration stations to automated passport control (APC) kiosks, access control and border control gates (ABC).

MODI is a member of the Fastpass Group, which proposes innovative solutions for the future borders of the EEC. MODI was one of the first providers of biometric facial recognition products in Europe. The millions "walkthroughs"​ of people identified by MODI devices prove the reliability and security of fully automatic biometric identification. The products like FaceBar | FaceScreen | FaceGate | FaceTower are used for sensitive production or office locations, airports, stadiums, leisure parks, casinos, etc.

MODI Trace | Industrial image processing:
The Incoming Goods Scanner is used to collect, register, record, reconcile and retrace electronic parts that are delivered. With the patented Adomo® technology, all types of codes and plain text (OCR) of delivered components are recognized and automatically matched with the individual ERP system. With this input- and quality control, all registrated products are always traceable.
 
MODI products are used everywhere where components are delivered and installed, such as in the automotive, pharmaceutical and cosmetics industries. | MODI is a german company specialized in Identification solutions for contactless biometrics (face and iris) and products traceability through innovative patented vision solutions such as ADOMO® to powerfully focus using moving mirrors and magnetic fields, as well as Near Infra Red to manage lighting environment,.. 

Vision for Biometrics

Face on the move, iris at a distance, anti-spoofing or anti-tail gating solutions make your access control solution secure while user friendly and efficient with maximized throughput.The product range goes from biometric enrolment station, kiosks for automated passport control  (APC) , access and border control gates ( ABC), goods entry station for Electronic Manufacturer Suppliers (EMS ), quality inspection system or code reading systems for traceability & supply chain .

MODI is a member of the Fastpass group in charge of proposing innovative solutions for the future borders of the EEC.  MODI has setup the first outdoor face recognition site in Europe. Millions of crossings through MODI equipment have proven the robust reliability of the systems setup  for sensitive production or office sites, airports, leisure parks,  casino…

Vison for the industry 

The same outstanding vision tools and software allow the reading of codes 1D or 2D  within special environments to ensure reliability of inventories, quality inspection of production, traceability of components, reading of codes at a distance…Incoming goods scanner, relabelling station , packing check, inspection scanning, pallets’ code recording make your quality and traceability more reliable.

MODI products are used within the automobile industry ( Electronic Manufacturer Suppliers for Surface Mounted Devices ) as well as the pharmaceutical, cosmetics and pipes industries. | About Die MODI GmbH ist ein deutsches Unternehmen, das sich auf Identifikationslösungen für die berührungslose Biometrie und die Rückverfolgbarkeit von industriellen Produkten durch innovative, patentierte Sichtlösungen wie ADOMO® spezialisiert hat. Impressum https://www.moditrace.net/impressum/ In der industriellen Bildverarbeitung und Sicherheitsüberwachung kommt es vor allem auf eines an: Den Blick fürs Detail. ... Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam hinsehen: Effizienter, schärfer und präziser denn je zuvor. Von einzigartiger Auflösung eröffnet Ihnen die Adomo-Technologie aus dem Hause MODI ungeahnte Perspektiven. Sie bietet Ihnen völlig neue Einsatzmöglichkeiten, für die es bisher keine Lösung gab. Ob das Lesen von DataMatrix Codes auf großen Flächen, bei Aufgabenstellungen rund um die biometrische Gesichtserkennung, bei Personenidentifizierung oder Fahreraufnahmen bei Höchstgeschwindigkeit, MODI begleitet Sie gerne auf den Weg in die Welt der Identifikation. Die MODI GmbH mit Standort Gummersbach entwickelt und produziert Inspektionssysteme und ID Lesesysteme mittels Kameratechnologie seit über 10 Jahren. Seit 2005 bildet das Herzstück aller Systeme, die zum Patent angemeldete ADOMO© Technologie. Bei dieser Technologie wird das Kamera Sichtfeld über einen 2-achsig bewegten Spiegel innerhalb weniger Millisekunden abgelenkt. Auf diese Weise wird selbst das Finden und Auswerten von sehr kleinen Merkmalen auf großen Flächen ermöglicht. Die ADOMO Technologie wird seit Jahren im Automotive Bereich eingesetzt, findet aber mittlerweile in allen Industrien in den Bereichen Traceability und Track&Trace seinen Einsatz. Identifikation auf Basis der biometrischen Auswertung von Gesichtsdaten eröffnete weitere Geschäftsfelder im Bereich der Sicherheitstechnik und Zutritts Kontrolle. So wird die ADOMO© Technologie seit 2009 u.a. für automatische Passkontrollen mit dem biometrischen Reisepass (ABC Gates) in Flughäfen eingesetzt und bietet die Möglichkeit der Personenidentifikation selbst in großen Hallen oder Plätzen ('Face in the crowd' ). records.shortDescription:
We are the specialists in visual inspection and identification solutions. As a reliable and enthusiastic partner, we provide turn-key solutions tailored to your specific requirements and wishes. As an integrator, we strive to implement the best-suited solution within your existing production and packaging processes. We collaborate with you as a manufacturer or OEM, aiming for a long-term partnership for the future.

We view quality assurance as “continuous improvement,” keeping it in focus and helping to further develop it within organizations.

Our ViTrack software provides full insight into inspection data and tracks all completed inspection points. The entire system can be managed from your own workstation, with data and images stored as verifiable evidence. Thanks to our API, integration with any ERP system is seamless and straightforward. Our standard modules and machines integrate smoothly into your existing operations, forming a cohesive whole within the PackCheck data platform. Our proprietary software is fully developed in-house and is 100% suitable for industrial production processes.

With inline inspection and identification, we prevent packaging machines from jamming and ensure the correct packaging materials are used throughout the process. This helps prevent (allergen) recalls and reduces waste.

Packaging quality control

Product quality control

Product identification

Packaging identification

Verification of films, labels, and text/barcodes

Order and stock control

Automatic registration of shipments

Our goal is to enhance your customer image while reducing costs!

Feel free to contact us to discuss how these solutions can be applied to your processes and where quality assurance and improvements are possible.

records.shortDescription:
Affix Engineering provides engineering services focused on industrial robot programming, machine vision solutions, AI and autonomous systems, and process optimization. The company programs robots from multiple brands for applications such as welding, pick and place, palletizing, assembly, and material handling. It designs and integrates 2D and 3D machine vision for inspection, quality control, bin picking, flex feeding, conveyor tracking, and depalletizing. Affix Engineering also develops custom software and AI-based automation to support decision-making and intelligent systems. Its engineers work with system integrators, machine builders, and end customers across sectors including automotive, food, technology, aerospace, pharmaceuticals, logistics, wood, and metalworking. || Affix Engineering is a specialist in programming industrial robots and has a goal to make the use of robots easier and more accessible. With years of experience and in-depth knowledge in the field of robotics and machine vision, Affix Engineering is able give everyone the tools and expertise for robot automation and machine vision. 

This is especially of great value for small and medium-sized businesses (MKB), where companies often do not have sufficient experience with robots and vision equipment. Because Affix also supports and advises the smaller and less wealthy companies in the implementation of automation solutions, these companies (including integrators and machine builders) can enjoy new and innovative technical solutions without any worries.

We are brand independent and familiar with most brands and systems. Through the development of software packages and various R&D processes, we are used to complex tasks, we can solve problems, improve processes and work with other people's software.

With approximately 8 programmers, Affix is working on various large and small projects for different customers in all imaginable branches, including: Automotive, Food, Technology, Aerospace, Pharmaceuticals, Logistics, Metal, ... . By working together as a team, with each other and with our partners, Affix is from the beginning of a project a real addition.

5683CM Best
The Netherlands

records.shortDescription: Vision Components GmbH is a leading supplier in the field of machine vision. Branches and distributors represent the Ettlingen-based company worldwide in more than 25 countries. Vision Components develops and distributes intelligent, network-compatible real-time Smart Cameras which are able to operate without a PC. These embedded vision solutions can be easily integrated into almost any machine or plant. Customers can choose between models with ARM processors and VC Linux firmware or DSP-based models with the proprietary VCRT operating system. The product portfolio includes Smart Cameras with a protective housing, single board cameras, and vision sensors. Vision Components also develops custom-tailored machine vision solutions for a wide range of applications. Typical applications include quality inspection and automation. Wir sind der einzige Roboterhersteller in Deutschland, der tatsächlich zu 100% in deutschem Besitz ist. Unsere Zulieferer sitzen mehrheitlich in Europa. Impressum pi4_robotics GmbH Gustav-Meyer-Allee 25 D-13355 Berlin ... Geschäftsführer: Dipl.-Ing. Matthias Krinke Vertretungsberechtigt: Dipl.-Ing. Ingo Neef Telefon / Fax: (030) 700 96 94 0 / (030) 700 96 94 69 Email: vertrieb@pi4.de Registergericht: Amtsgericht Berlin Registernummer: HRB 80513 Umsatzsteuer-Identifikationsnummer gem. § 27a UStG: DE 217617178 Inhaltlich Verantwortliche: Matthias Krinke, Thomas Manke (Anschrift s.o.) See More Die Firma pi4_robotics GmbH ist mit rund 50 Mitarbeitern einer der führenden Hersteller von Bildverarbeitungssystemen, Prüfautomaten und Robotern mit Sitz in Be ... rlin. Die Systemlösungen werden derzeit vor allem in den Branchen Photovoltaik, Automotive, Glas, Medizin und Pharma, Brennstoffzellen sowie im Bereich Keramik eingesetzt. In der Photovoltaik-Branche ist pi4_robotics wegweisend mit Qualitätsprüfsystemen auf Basis der Elektrolumineszenz-Technologie. pi4_robotics ist der Erfinder des Produktidentifikationssystems PV-IDent. Dabei werden auf Basis von Elektrolumineszenz-Bildern von Solarmodulen inhärente Produktmerkmale ermittelt, die zur Wiedererkennung verwendet werden. PV-IDent ist ein eingetragenes Markenzeichen der pi4_robotics GmbH. pi4_robotics GmbH ist in der Öffentlichkeit auch durch den im Jahr 2010 erstmals vorgestellten pi4_workerbot bekannt geworden. Der pi4_workerbot ist weltweit der erste humanoide Fabrikarbeiter der käuflich zu erwerben ist. Dieses Produkt führte unter anderem zur Vergabe des MM-Awards auf der Automatica 2010, des Tech-Star 2010 auf der Messe Vienna-Tec und wurde Finalist beim euRobotics TechTransfer Award 2011. Dipl.-Ing. Matthias Krinke hat das Unternehmen pi4_robotics GmbH im Jahre 1994 zunächst als Gewerbebetrieb gegründet und sechs Jahre später zu einer GmbH umgewandelt. Seit 1994 befinden sich Hauptsitz und Produktion am Standort Berlin. Seit 2003 ist das Unternehmen weltweit durch Vertriebs- und Servicepartner in 29 Ländern mit 43 Büros vertreten. _________________________________________________ pi4_robotics is one of the leading manufacturers of machine vision systems, automatic inspection systems and robots, based in Berlin, Germany. Currently its system solutions are particularly used in such industry sectors as photovoltaics, automotive, glass, medicine and pharmaceuticals, fuel cell manufacturing as well as in the field of ceramics. In the photovoltaic industry pi4_robotics is leading the way with its quality inspection systems based on electroluminescent technology. pi4_robotics invented the product identification system PV-Ident. On the basis of electroluminescence images of solar panels, this system detects inherent product characteristics and uses them for product recognition. PV-Ident is a registered trademark of pi4_robotics GmbH. In 2010, pi4_robotics GmbH raised public awareness by introducing its pi4_workerbot. pi4_workerbot is the first humanoid factory worker worldwide that can be acquired by purchase. This product has won inter alia the MM Awards at Automatica 2010, the Tech-Star 2010 at the trade fair VIENNA-TEC, and became a finalist at euRobotics TechTransfer Award 2011. records.shortDescription:
ADS Engineering GmbH provides engineering services across the full lifecycle from idea to prototype and market-ready product or special machine. The company focuses on mechanical engineering, mechatronic systems, automation and robotics, and life sciences applications. Its team develops embedded systems, device controllers, databases and regression algorithms, as well as user-centric interfaces and scalable software for machines and products. ADS Engineering also covers vacuum and fluidics, measurement and control technology, and quality control with camera-based vision systems. The organization applies agile project management methods to support industrial customers and other technology-driven clients. || ADS Engineering offers product development, special machine construction, automation, robotics, and software services. | ADS Engineering GmbH provides engineering services across the full lifecycle from idea to prototype and market-ready product or special machine. The company focuses on mechanical engineering, mechatronic systems, automation and robotics, and life sciences applications. Its team develops embedded systems, device controllers, databases and regression algorithms, as well as user-centric interfaces and scalable software for machines and products. ADS Engineering also covers vacuum and fluidics, measurement and control technology, and quality control with camera-based vision systems. The organization applies agile project management methods to support industrial customers and other technology-driven clients. | Ideen identifizieren und Visionen umsetzen

Als Entwicklungs-Dienstleister ist ADS-Engineering Ihr kreativer Innovationsmotor und verlässlicher Partner. Mit unserer Erfahrung in den Gebieten Physik, Mechanik, Software und Elektronik begleiten wir Sie von der Idee über den Prototyp bis zum marktreifen Produkt.
Gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden entwickeln wir zielgerichtete technologische Lösungen. Erfindergeist und handwerkliches Können treiben uns seit 25 Jahren an. Geräte zu entwickeln, die bis ins Detail durchdacht und zukunftsweisend sind - das ist unsere Leidenschaft. | Erkennen wo es langgeht - unsere Spezialität

Die Neugier steht immer an erster Stelle - Wir haben den Ehrgeiz, für unsere Kunden die beste Lösung zu finden. Dies erreichen wir durch Erfahrung, Professionalität und unser kreatives Potential. Mit Intelligenz, Leidenschaft und Teamgeist begleiten wir unsere Projekte zum Erfolg.

Meilensteine sind für uns Trophäen - Als externe Partner nutzen wir bewusst kreative Spielräume und erarbeiten daraus neue Produktlösungen. Unsere umfassende Erfahrung und das fach-spezifische Wissen unserer Kunden bilden so einen einzigartigen Brainpool.

Wir unterstützen Unternehmen projektbezogen bei der Optimierung stra-tegischer Fragestellungen. Damit die Konzepte und Ideen auch greifbar werden, begleiten wir unsere Kunden von der Konzeptarbeit über die Ent-wicklung bis hin zur Serienreife von Produkten.

Ihr Partner für die Projektanalyse und -umsetzung
Jedes Projektengagement von ADS Engineering wird durch die Bedürfnisse der Kunden definiert. Sie wählen aus unserem reichhaltigen Fundus von Fachwissen und Erfahrung gezielt die benötigten Kompetenzen. Dabei le-gen wir höchsten Wert auf Qualität und Effizienz.

Sicherheit im Entscheidungsprozess - Unsere langjährigen Erfahrungen aus dem Umfeld der Medizinaltechnik, Life Sciences und dem klassischen Maschinenbau werden durch ein breites Technologienetzwerk ergänzt.

records.shortDescription:
CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. We are pioneers in leveraging CV and associated technologies in the visual inspection process. We deploy our solutions through bespoke Rigs, mobile devices or UAVs depending on the customer requirements for precision and speed. We work closely with our customers to enable retrofit solutions that do not require too many changes to the existing workflow. Defect/damage visual inspections are labour intensive and therefore subjective, slow, and prone to error. We eliminate subjectivity, future proof the process and make sure that the current throughput is not affected in any way. Our solution is the ultimate control tower that enables creation of a visual track and trace audit trail across the life cycle of the product. Our solutions increase efficiencies and offer non-linear scalability. We ensure contactless solutions that enable our partners to have business continuity. Our current operations are in India, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. We plan to expand into other regions very soon and position ourselves as the quality inspection partner of choice for enterprises across the world by future proofing their processes. We are headquartered in Bangalore, INDIA and have an office in Dubai, UAE. The company has today grown into a strong team of technocrats and thinkers who are reimagining the future. || CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. Metapack Engineering S.r.l is an Italian company which operates in the field of industrial automation since 2000. 

With the founding values of specific competence, innovation and strong customer orientation, Metapack turns innovative solutions into fully engineered systems taylored to the specific needs of Customers. 

Mainly specialized in the fields of pharmaceuticals, chemicals, food and beverage, and converting, Metapack provides for each phase of the solution deployment, from Customer URS analisys, through Detailed Design and machine manufacturing, up to the FAT/SAT processes and final installation, training and take-over support.

Among the specific competences of Metapack Engineering:
•	Late stage customization of cartons, labels, blister and Pharma Foils
•	Digital Identification/Printing systems (DOD UV, TIJ, CIJ and LASER printing)
•	Vision systems (COGNEX certified integrator) 
•	Traceability systems (pharmaceutical serialization, aggregation and related technologies)
•	Fast Decoding and print quality inspection in one system (V-Plus)
•	Blow Fill Seal Monodoses - Print and fill level inspection
•	Blister Single - Print and inspection
•	Print on Pharma Foils

Over the years, Metapack has developed uninterrupted tracking systems not only in Italy.
Many of our customers are pharmaceutical companies from all over the world (American, Asian and European companies). Our assistance services, guaranteed on site for the whole time of the cooperation, are structured with a team of engineers all over the world.

The entire production chain is carried out within the industrial plant. The design is managed by our team of engineers, who allows us to create machines that can be customized for all needs.

We are looking for new projects,

Our technology makes it possible: Thanks to the modular structure, the variety of applications and processes and the simple adaptability, we can react quickly to changes in market demand. In view of the ever shorter product life cycles, this is a major competitive advantage.
Whether driver assistance cameras or contact lenses - the component spectrum of the products manufactured on our systems usually comprises
Dimensions from 1x1x1 mm up to 100x100x100 mm
Weights from a few grams to 2 kg
Cycle times from 0.1 second
There are little things, such as distinct customer proximity, extremely high quality and a basis of mutual trust which make a big difference.

records.shortDescription:
ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists. || ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based automated optical inspection, defect detection, and predictive analytics systems for industrial applications. | ATHENAIS SA develops AI-based systems for automated visual inspection and predictive analytics in industrial environments. The company offers defect detection solutions that optimize Cognex ViDi and Halcon MVTec configurations from customer OK/NOK image sets using an unsupervised hyperoptimization approach. Its AIS platform supports deployment of automatic optical inspection systems with configurable hardware such as lenses, cameras, inkers, and illumination. ATHENAIS SA also provides predictive analytics tools for anomaly detection in IoT and other operational signals. The portfolio includes MAP Pilot for image collection and MAP Inspect for manual image tagging and labeling by client quality teams or Athenais specialists. | Welcome to the new era of Automated Optical Inspection with deep learning.
